/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o  -L/home/amovlab-z410/ROS1_Project_Learning/demo05_ws/build_isolated/urdf01_rviz/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src -Wl,-rpath,/home/amovlab-z410/ROS1_Project_Learning/demo05_ws/build_isolated/urdf01_rviz/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src:/home/amovlab-z410/ROS1_Project_Learning/demo05_ws/build_isolated/urdf01_rviz/gtest/googlemock/gtest -lpthread libgtest.so -lpthread
